login.title: Create an Account
login.subtitle: Sign in with your mobile number, system will send your verified OTP.

otp.title: OTP Verification
otp.instruction: Enter the verification code we have sent to: {phone}
otp.resendTimer: You may request OTP in {time} s

register.step3Instruction: Set a 6-digit passcode for quick access.
register.saveDialogBody: Your information has been saved. You can continue registering later.

passcode.logoutBody: You'll need to enter your phone number and OTP to log back in.

errors.phoneTooShortTH: Enter a valid Thai number (9-10 digits after +66).
errors.phoneTooShortMM: Enter a valid Myanmar number (7-11 digits after +95).
errors.phoneInvalid: Phone number format is not valid.
errors.otpExpired: This code has expired. Tap Resend OTP to get a new one.
errors.otpRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait before requesting a new code.
errors.passcodeMismatch: Passcodes do not match. Please try again.
errors.accountLocked: Too many incorrect attempts. Please log in with your phone number.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

fields.title: Title
fields.checkInfoDisclaimer: Check all information provided before confirming the registration.

preReg.heading: Before You Register
preReg.subtext: Please have the following documents ready. You will need them to complete your registration.
preReg.doc1: Thai National ID Card or Passport

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.checkbox1: I have read and agree to the Terms & Conditions
terms.checkbox2: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy
terms.errorBothRequired: Please accept both the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy to continue

dailyLimit.title: Transfer Limits
dailyLimit.disclaimer: Limits apply to all outgoing transfers combined across all channels.

selfie.instruction: Position your face within the circle
selfie.helper: Look directly at the camera and ensure good lighting
selfie.reviewHint: Make sure your face is clearly visible with no obstructions
